---
title: "Workflow Overview"
format: html
---

### Crediting Baseline

:::: terra-card

<iframe 
src="https://miro.com/app/live-embed/uXjVGWtDRtw=/?focusWidget=3458764665221763879&amp;embedMode=view_only_without_ui&amp;embedId=591528665501"
frameborder="0"
scrolling="no"
allow="fullscreen; clipboard-read; clipboard-write"
allowfullscreen
loading="lazy"
style="
width: 100%;
height: 1000px;
border: none;
border-radius: 4px 4px 0 0;
display: block;
margin-bottom: 0;
">
</iframe>

**Figure 1. Crediting Baseline Step by Step from Hub for Validation – Habitat Conversion Risk Method**

::::

</div>
